languages.text: "Я не... я не понимаю, элантах. Все знают, кто ты. Экипаж, свита. В чем трагедия пропажи какой-то бумаги?"

traits.locale_text: "Я не... я не понимаю, элантах. Все знают, кто ты. Экипаж, свита. В чем трагедия пропажи какой-то бумаги?"
traits.speaker: YrlietCompanion

traits.locale_text: [ДРАФТ]"Я не... я не понимаю, элантах. Все знают, кто ты. Экипаж, свита. После {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Футфола{/g} — весь Простор. В чем трагедия пропажи какой-то бумаги?"

languages.text: "I do not... I do not understand, elantach. Everyone knows who you are. The crew, the retinue. What tragedy is there in the loss of some piece of paper?"
languages.original_text: "Я не... я не понимаю, элантах. Все знают, кто ты. Экипаж, свита. В чем трагедия пропажи какой-то бумаги?"

traits.locale_text: "I do not... I do not understand, elantach. Everyone knows who you are. The crew, the retinue. What tragedy is there in the loss of some piece of paper?"
"I do not... I do not understand, elantach. Everyone knows who you are. The crew, the retinue. What tragedy is there in the loss of some piece of paper?"
"I do not... I do not understand, elantach. Everyone knows who you are. The crew, the retinue. What tragedy is there in the loss of some piece of paper?"
"I do not... I do not understand, elantach. Everyone knows who you are. The crew, the retinue. What tragedy is there in the loss of some piece of paper?"
"I do not... I do not understand, elantach. Everyone knows who you are. The crew, the retinue. What tragedy is there in the loss of some piece of paper?"

languages.text: «No... no lo entiendo, elantach. Todo el mundo sabe quién eres. La tripulación y tu séquito. Entonces, ¿por qué es tan trágica la pérdida de un simple papel?».
languages.original_text: "I do not... I do not understand, elantach. Everyone knows who you are. The crew, the retinue. What tragedy is there in the loss of some piece of paper?"

traits.locale_text: «No... no lo entiendo, elantach. Todo el mundo sabe quién eres. La tripulación y tu séquito. Entonces, ¿por qué es tan trágica la pérdida de un simple papel?».

languages.text: “我……我不明白，外界人。所有人都知道你是谁。船员们知道，随从们也知道。丢了一张纸，又有什么大难临头的？”
languages.original_text: "I do not... I do not understand, elantach. Everyone knows who you are. The crew, the retinue. What tragedy is there in the loss of some piece of paper?"

traits.locale_text: “我……我不明白，外界人。所有人都知道你是谁。船员们知道，随从们也知道。丢了一张纸，又有什么大难临头的？”

languages.text: « Je ne... je ne comprends pas, elantach. Tout le monde sait qui vous êtes. L'équipage, votre entourage... Quelle tragédie pourrait-il y avoir dans la perte d'un simple morceau de papier ? »
languages.original_text: "I do not... I do not understand, elantach. Everyone knows who you are. The crew, the retinue. What tragedy is there in the loss of some piece of paper?"

traits.locale_text: « Je ne... je ne comprends pas, elantach. Tout le monde sait qui vous êtes. L'équipage, votre entourage... Quelle tragédie pourrait-il y avoir dans la perte d'un simple morceau de papier ? »

languages.text: "Ben... Anlamıyorum elantach. Herkes senin kim olduğunu biliyor. Mürettebat, maiyet. Bir kâğıt parçasının kaybolması nasıl trajediye dönebilir?"
languages.original_text: "I do not... I do not understand, elantach. Everyone knows who you are. The crew, the retinue. What tragedy is there in the loss of some piece of paper?"

traits.locale_text: "Ben... Anlamıyorum elantach. Herkes senin kim olduğunu biliyor. Mürettebat, maiyet. Bir kâğıt parçasının kaybolması nasıl trajediye dönebilir?"

languages.text: "Ich ... Ich verstehe nicht, Elantach. Jeder weiß, wer Ihr seid. Die Crew, das Gefolge. Was ist so schlimm am Verlust eines Stück Papiers?"
languages.original_text: "I do not... I do not understand, elantach. Everyone knows who you are. The crew, the retinue. What tragedy is there in the loss of some piece of paper?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich ... Ich verstehe nicht, Elantach. Jeder weiß, wer Ihr seid. Die Crew, das Gefolge. Was ist so schlimm am Verlust eines Stück Papiers?"

languages.text: "私は...理解できないよ、エランタック。みんな君が誰だか知っている。クルーも、従者も。紙切れを失ったからといって、どんな悲劇がある？"
languages.original_text: "I do not... I do not understand, elantach. Everyone knows who you are. The crew, the retinue. What tragedy is there in the loss of some piece of paper?"

traits.locale_text: "私は...理解できないよ、エランタック。みんな君が誰だか知っている。クルーも、従者も。紙切れを失ったからといって、どんな悲劇がある？"
